note: Hybrid-by-design: 5 single-page invoice PDFs that exercise the pdf-extract skill across deliberately different layouts (schema variants A-E) and multiple currencies (USD / EUR / CNY). The AP payment ledger is synthetic but realistic and was added in this hardening round to require cross-file reconciliation. Synthesis is load-bearing here because real B2B invoices and payment exports are proprietary; the task focuses on cross-layout extraction and accounting reconciliation, not content fidelity.

entries.description: Office-supply invoice, USD, schema variant A (SKU / Description / Qty / Unit Price / Amount).
Logistics invoice, EUR, schema variant B (Item Code / Item / Quantity / Rate / Line Total).
Cloud services invoice, USD, schema variant C (Part# / Product / Units / Price/Unit / Ext. Price).
Consulting invoice, USD, schema variant D (Code / Service / Hrs / Hourly / Subtotal).
Manufacturing invoice, CNY, schema variant E (SKU / Desc / Count / Each / Total).
Synthetic AP payment export keyed by invoice_number for cross-file reconciliation.
